sections_1.name: Breakfast Grab n Go

items.name: Lox Bagel Sandwich
items.description: plain bagel, smoked Atlantic salmon, chive cream cheese, capers, and sliced cucumbers.

items.name: Chia Seed Pudding
items.description: Chia seeds, oat milk, honey, fresh mixed berries

items.name: Strawberry Yogurt Parfait
items.description: Vanilla yogurt, honey oat granola, honey and fresh berries

items.name: Overnight Oats
items.description: Old-fashioned rolled oats, organic Straus whole milk, honey, and fresh mixed berries

items.qp_name: Bacon Egg and Cheese Breakfast Sandwich
items.name: Bacon Egg and Cheese Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Toasted English muffin, cage-free fried egg, American cheese, crisp bacon

items.name: Egg and Cheese Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Toasted English muffin, cage-free fried egg, American cheese

items.name: Ham Croissant Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Savory butter croissant, house-made rosemary glazed ham, cage-free fried egg and Swiss cheese

sections_1.currently_available_qp_schedule_name: DS23 Cafe Sunstream Lunch and Dinner MO
sections_1.name: Lunch Grab n Go

items.name: Classic Chicken Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine hearts, Marys free-range diced chicken breast, grated parmesan, house-made seasoned croutons, and Caesar dressing

items.qp_name: Strawberry Arugula Salad with Feta Cheese
items.name: Strawberry Arugula Salad w Feta Cheese
items.description: Wild arugula, fresh local strawberries, feta cheese, and citrus vinaigrette

items.name: Grilled Portobello Mushroom Vegan Panini
items.description: Focaccia bread, hummus spread, balsamic grilled Portobello mushroom, and grilled vegetables (zucchini, bell peppers, squash)

items.name: Ciabatta Caprese Sandwich
items.description: Ciabatta bread, heirloom tomatoes, house-made basil sauce, and balsamic drizzle

items.name: Roast Beef Panini
items.description: Focaccia bread, horseradish aioli, house-roasted tri-tip, white cheddar, and pickled onions

items.name: Tuscan Roast Turkey Sandwich
items.description: Ciabatta, thinly sliced turkey, crispy bacon, roasted peppers with herbs, olive oil, paprika, basil, red pepper flakes, sundried tomato spread, and Provolone cheese.
